entry.title: New IDC SAQMMA10D0018 awarded to STANLEY ASSOCIATES, INC. for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: GLOBAL SUPPORT STRATEGY PROVIDES SUPPORT SERVICES FOR NONIMMIGRANT AND IMMIGRANT VISA OPERATIONS AT US CONSULATES AND EMBASSIES ABROAD.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC SAQMMA10D0018 (M0015) awarded to CGI FEDERAL INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: UNIQUE ENTITY ID OR LEGAL BUSINESS NAME CHANGE - NON-NOVATION

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSES OF THIS MODIFICATION ARE TO CHANGE THE COMPANY'S NAME AND PAYMENT INFORMATION IN ACCORDANCE WITH FAR 42.1204 AND THE CONTRACTOR'S NOVATION AGREEMENT DATED 5/22/15. THEREFORE, THE CONTRACTOR'S NAME IS CHANGED FROM "STANLEY ASSOICATES, INC." TO "CGI FEDERAL INC."

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
